metadata.composition: SignalCenterV1 + CarryBaselinePlugin + DirectionalMTFPlugin + SOLFlipKillSwitchPlugin + VolTargetSizingPlugin + HybridKellyPlugin

perSymbolDisclosure.SOL: CarryBaselinePlugin + SOLFlipKillSwitchPlugin + VolTargetSizingPlugin + HybridKellyPlugin (1 active + 3 modifiers; carry $10k full base)

hardConstraint.mandateText: ALL trades MUST use EXACTLY 1:10 leverage. No more, no less.

signalCenter.composition: SignalBus + StrategyRegistry + PortfolioRiskEngine + StrategyTelemetry + VolTarget (per-bar calc) + HybridKelly (per-bar calc)

threeLayerDefense.layer1: constructor refuses maxLeverage > 10 (PASS — config validation across all 5 plugins)
threeLayerDefense.layer2: start() runs assertLeverageInvariant on initial risk-engine notional state
threeLayerDefense.layer3: per-bar leverageInvariantGuard at SCv1 portfolio level: 0 breach(es) detected (must be 0)
threeLayerDefense.pluginLayer2: SOLFlipKillSwitchPlugin._emitRiskSignal calls assertLeverageInvariant on every emit (404 assertions fired)
threeLayerDefense.volModifierDefense: VolTargetSizingPlugin recordClose + currentMultiplierForSymbol — multiplier bounded [0.25, 1], effective notional ≤ $100000 per bar. Max observed: $100000.
threeLayerDefense.hybridKellyDefense: HybridKellyPlugin recordClose + currentKellyBucketForSymbol — Kelly bucket ∈ [0.25, 1.0] (kellyCap=1), VolTarget owns vol-targeting so HybridKelly contributes Kelly bucket only.

carry.attributionNote: Carry P&L accrues at 8h funding boundaries. VolTarget + HybridKelly (combined multiplier) further scale per-bar deltas.

defensiveKillSwitch.attributionNote: Defensive plugin emits RiskSignals ONLY (no SizingSignals).

defensiveVolTarget.attributionNote: Moreira-Muir inverse-vol scaling. avg=0.521, min=0.252, max=1.000.

defensiveHybridKelly.attributionNote: Funding-Sharpe Kelly bucket. avg=0.622, min=0.250, max=1.000, avgSharpe=0.653.

portfolioRisk.note: Aggregate leverage is across carry + directional SizingSignals routed through SCv1's risk engine. VolTarget + HybridKelly operate as per-bar calculators (not bus modifiers) — do NOT contribute additional notional to the risk engine's aggregate. 1:10 cap holds cleanly across all 5 plugins.
